mapper.insert: insert into T_BASE_DICTIONARYDEFINE (L_DICTIONARY_NO, VC_DIC_NAME, VC_DIS_FILED, VC_DIS_DESCRIBE, VC_DIS_OTHERFIELDS, VC_GROUP_REMARK, C_USER_MODIFY, C_VALID_STATUS) values (#{lDictionaryNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcDicName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcDisFiled,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcDisDescribe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcDisOtherfields,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcGroupRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cUserModify,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cValidStatus,jdbcType=CHAR})
mapper.select: select L_DICTIONARY_NO, VC_DIC_NAME, VC_DIS_FILED, VC_DIS_DESCRIBE, VC_DIS_OTHERFIELDS, VC_GROUP_REMARK, C_USER_MODIFY, C_VALID_STATUS from T_BASE_DICTIONARYDEFINE

SELECT a.L_DICTIONARY_NO, a.VC_DIC_NAME, a.VC_GROUP_REMARK, T.VC_ITEM_VALUE, T.VC_ITEM_NAME FROM T_BASE_DICTIONARY T JOIN t_Base_Dictionarydefine A ON T.l_dictionary_no = A.l_dictionary_no WHERE T .l_dictionary_no = #{dictCode} AND SUBSTR (VC_GROUP_MASK ,#{subPosition}, 1) = 1 ORDER BY T.VC_INDEX
